description: Complete avionics, navigation, mission systems, electronic warfare, radar, communications, and AI systems ontology for military aircraft.

FlightComputers.label: Flight Computers
FlightComputers.description: Computational systems for flight control, stability, and vehicle management.

FlyByWireSystem.label: Fly-By-Wire Flight Control System
FlyByWireSystem.description: Electronic flight control system replacing mechanical linkages. Computers interpret pilot input and command actuators.

OpticalFBW.label: Fly-By-Light
OpticalFBW.description: Fiber optic signal transmission replacing copper wire.

ActuatorControlElectronics.label: Actuator Control Electronics (ACE)
ActuatorControlElectronics.description: Local computer controlling flight control actuator.

AerodynamicModel.label: Aerodynamic Model / Lookup Tables
AerodynamicModel.description: Internal aero model used for control law computation.

StabilityAugmentationSystem.label: Stability Augmentation System (SAS)
StabilityAugmentationSystem.description: Provides artificial stability to inherently unstable aircraft.

FlightDirector.label: Flight Director
FlightDirector.description: Commands pilot inputs to follow computed flight path.

GCAS.label: Ground Collision Avoidance System
GCAS.description: Automatically recovers aircraft from CFIT situations.

ACAS_TCAS.label: Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS / ACAS)
ACAS_TCAS.description: Detects and avoids midair collision with other aircraft.

VehicleManagementSystem.label: Vehicle Management System (VMS)
VehicleManagementSystem.description: Integrated computer managing all aircraft subsystems including fuel, hydraulic, electrical, and ECS.

MissionComputer.label: Mission Computer
MissionComputer.description: Central processing system integrating sensor data, navigation, fire control, and mission management.

SensorFusionProcessor.label: Sensor Fusion Processor
SensorFusionProcessor.description: Fuses radar, IRST, EW, and datalink tracks into single recognized air picture.

ThreatLibrary.label: Threat Emitter Library
ThreatLibrary.description: Database of enemy radar and threat signatures for EW system.

WeaponManagement.label: Weapon Management System
WeaponManagement.description: Controls weapon selection, arming, release sequencing, and employment modes.

MissionData.label: Mission Data Files
MissionData.description: Threat data, routes, targets, IFF codes loaded pre-mission.

Displays.label: Cockpit Display Systems
Displays.description: All visual information presentation systems in the cockpit.

HUD.label: Head Up Display (HUD)
HUD.description: Projects flight and weapon symbology onto a combiner glass in pilot's forward field of view.

CRT_HUD.label: CRT-Based HUD
CRT_HUD.description: Older cathode ray tube based HUD.

WaveGuide_HUD.label: Waveguide Holographic HUD
WaveGuide_HUD.description: Holographic combiner for wider field of view.

HMD.label: Helmet Mounted Display / Sight
HMD.description: Weapon aiming and flight symbology projected onto helmet visor.

MultiFunction_Display.label: Multi-Function Display (MFD)
MultiFunction_Display.description: Reconfigurable color display presenting tactical, navigation, and system status information.

WideFovDisplay.label: Wide Field of View Display / Large Area Display
WideFovDisplay.description: Single large screen replacing multiple MFDs. F-35, F-22 style.

UpFrontController.label: Up Front Controller (UFC)
UpFrontController.description: Primary data entry device for radios, frequencies, IFF codes, navigation data.

ACMI.label: Air Combat Maneuvering Instrumentation Pod
ACMI.description: Records 3D position and weapon events for debrief.

Navigation.label: Navigation Systems
Navigation.description: All systems providing aircraft position, attitude, and course guidance.

INS.label: Inertial Navigation System
INS.description: Self-contained navigation using accelerometers and gyroscopes.

RLG_INS.label: Ring Laser Gyro INS
RLG_INS.description: High accuracy INS using laser gyros.

MEMS_INS.label: MEMS INS
MEMS_INS.description: Micro-electromechanical sensor based INS for UAVs.

NuclearINS.label: Nuclear Safe Inertial Platform
NuclearINS.description: Platform that survives EMP of nuclear detonation.

NavigationComputer.label: Navigation Filter / Kalman Filter
NavigationComputer.description: Optimal state estimator combining INS, GPS, and other aiding.

GPS.label: GPS Receiver
GPS.description: Satellite-based absolute position and time reference.

SAASM.label: Selective Availability Anti-Spoofing Module (SAASM)
SAASM.description: Military P(Y) code GPS receiver with anti-jam and anti-spoof.

M_Code.label: M-Code GPS
M_Code.description: New military GPS signal with improved jam resistance.

CRPA.label: Controlled Reception Pattern Antenna
CRPA.description: Adaptive null-steering antenna rejecting jamming signals.

Multi_Constellation.label: Multi-Constellation GNSS
Multi_Constellation.description: Capable of GPS, GLONASS, BeiDou, Galileo, NavIC signals.

AirDataSystem.label: Air Data System
AirDataSystem.description: Measures ambient pressure, temperature, and derived airspeed parameters.

FlushedAirDataSystem.label: Flush Air Data System (FADS)
FlushedAirDataSystem.description: Multi-port orifice system replacing pitot probe for stealth aircraft.

RadarAltimeter.label: Radar Altimeter
RadarAltimeter.description: Measures absolute height above terrain via radar reflection.

TerrainFollowing.label: Terrain Following / Terrain Avoidance
TerrainFollowing.description: Automatic low-level flight system maintaining safe clearance above terrain.

RadarTF.label: Radar-Based Terrain Following
RadarTF.description: Forward-looking radar scans terrain and feeds autopilot.

TERPROM.label: TERPROM (Terrain Profile Matching)
TERPROM.description: Compares digital terrain database to radar altimeter readout.

TACAN.label: Tactical Air Navigation (TACAN)
TACAN.description: UHF bearing and distance measurement from ground/ship beacon.

RadarSystems.label: Airborne Radar Systems
RadarSystems.description: All airborne radar types including fire control, weather, terrain, and SAR/GMTI.

AESA.label: Active Electronically Scanned Array (AESA)
AESA.description: Radar using thousands of Transmit/Receive modules. No mechanical scanning. Simultaneous multiple beams, very fast scan, high reliability.

TRModule.label: Transmit/Receive (T/R) Module
TRModule.description: Individual solid-state RF transmitter/receiver element in array.

AntennaArray.label: Antenna Array / Face
AntennaArray.description: Full array of T/R modules forming beam.

RWS.label: Range While Search
RWS.description: Wide area air search with range indication.

TWS.label: Track While Scan
TWS.description: Maintains tracks on multiple targets while continuing search.

STT.label: Single Target Track
STT.description: Dedicated high accuracy track of single target.

VS.label: Velocity Search
VS.description: Long range detection emphasizing closing velocity.

SAR.label: Synthetic Aperture Radar Mode
SAR.description: High resolution ground mapping for strike targeting.

LPI.label: Low Probability of Intercept Mode
LPI.description: Wide bandwidth frequency hopping to avoid radar warning detection.

PESA.label: Passive Electronically Scanned Array (PESA)
PESA.description: Single transmitter feeding array of phase shifters. Electronic beam steering without mechanical rotation.

PulseDopplerRadar.label: Pulse Doppler Radar
PulseDopplerRadar.description: Uses Doppler shift to separate moving targets from ground clutter.

HPRF.label: High PRF
HPRF.description: Best velocity resolution, range ambiguous. Lookdown/shootdown.

MPRF.label: Medium PRF
MPRF.description: Balanced velocity and range. Used for TWS.

WeatherRadar.label: Weather Radar
WeatherRadar.description: Detects precipitation and storm cells for routing.

ISAR.label: Inverse SAR
ISAR.description: Uses relative motion of a ship to form high-resolution radar image.

ElectroOptical.label: Electro-Optical / Infrared Systems
ElectroOptical.description: Passive and active optical and infrared sensor systems.

IRST.label: Infrared Search and Track (IRST)
IRST.description: Passive wide-area infrared surveillance for air target detection without emitting radar. Impossible to trigger RWR.

FLIR.label: Forward Looking Infrared (FLIR)
FLIR.description: Infrared imaging for night navigation and targeting.

NavigationFLIR.label: Navigation FLIR
NavigationFLIR.description: Wide FOV thermal imagery for night flight.

TargetingFLIR.label: Targeting FLIR
TargetingFLIR.description: Narrow FOV high resolution thermal targeting.

TargetingPod.label: Targeting Pod
TargetingPod.description: Gyro-stabilized multi-sensor pod for precision targeting, laser designation, and BDA.

RECCELITE.description: Recce pod with EO and IR sensors.

Gimbal.label: Stabilized Gimbal Platform
Gimbal.description: Gyro-stabilized mount isolating sensor from aircraft motion.

DAS.label: Distributed Aperture System (DAS)
DAS.description: Multiple IR cameras providing full spherical situational awareness around aircraft.

ElectronicWarfare.label: Electronic Warfare Systems
ElectronicWarfare.description: Systems for electronic attack, electronic protection, and electronic support.

RadarWarningReceiver.label: Radar Warning Receiver (RWR)
RadarWarningReceiver.description: Detects, classifies, and locates radar emissions threatening aircraft.

MissileWarningSystem.label: Missile Approach Warning System (MAWS)
MissileWarningSystem.description: UV or IR sensors detecting missile launch and approach.

JammingSystem.label: Electronic Jamming System
JammingSystem.description: Active RF transmitters denying or degrading enemy radar capability.

DRFM.label: Digital Radio Frequency Memory (DRFM)
DRFM.description: Records and replicates radar signal to create false targets or deny range/Doppler information.

Countermeasures.label: Expendable Countermeasures
Countermeasures.description: Dispensed decoys disrupting IR and RF guided weapons.

Pyrotechnic.label: Pyrotechnic Flare
Pyrotechnic.description: Burning magnesium/MTV flare producing broadband IR.

Kinematic.label: Kinematic Flare
Kinematic.description: Aerodynamically maneuvering flare with programmed flight path.

Chaff.label: Chaff
Chaff.description: Clouds of metal-coated fibers returning false radar echoes.

TowedDecoy.label: Towed Radar Decoy
TowedDecoy.description: Electronic repeater towed behind aircraft attracting radar-guided missiles.

DIRCM.label: Directed Infrared Countermeasures (DIRCM)
DIRCM.description: Laser system defeating IR-guided missiles by dazzling or burning seeker.

ESM.label: Electronic Support Measures (ESM)
ESM.description: Passive collection and analysis of electromagnetic emissions for intelligence.

ECM.label: Electronic Countermeasures (ECM)
ECM.description: Active measures to deny, degrade, or deceive enemy electronics.

ECCM.label: Electronic Counter-Countermeasures (ECCM)
ECCM.description: Protective measures ensuring own radar and communications function in jammed environment.

Communications.label: Communications Systems
Communications.description: All voice, data, and network communications systems.

Link16.label: Link 16 (TADIL-J)
Link16.description: NATO standard TDMA data link for air picture sharing, targeting, voice.

Link22.label: Link 22 (NATO J)
Link22.description: HF/UHF supplement to Link 16 for BLOS operations.

MADL.label: Multifunction Advanced Data Link (MADL)
MADL.description: High-capacity, low probability of intercept data link for F-35 formation operations.

IFDL.label: Intra-Flight Data Link (IFDL)
IFDL.description: F-22 specific encrypted tactical data link.

CDL.label: Common Data Link
CDL.description: Wideband video and ISR data downlink from sensors to ground.

BeiDou_RDSS.label: BeiDou RDSS Data Link (China)
BeiDou_RDSS.description: Short message service and navigation combined in BeiDou for PLA platforms.

IFF.label: Identification Friend or Foe (IFF)
IFF.description: Secondary radar transponder system for friend/foe identification.

Mode5.label: Mode 5
Mode5.description: Encrypted next-gen military IFF, interoperable with Mark XII.

UHF_SATCOM.label: UHF SATCOM
UHF_SATCOM.description: Legacy voice and low data rate. MILSTAR, AEHF, UFO.

AIandAutonomous.label: AI and Autonomous Systems
AIandAutonomous.description: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, and autonomous decision-support systems integrated into military aircraft.

SensorFusionAI.label: AI Sensor Fusion
SensorFusionAI.description: Machine learning algorithms fusing multi-source sensor data into a common recognized picture.

TargetRecognition.label: AI Target Recognition / NCTR
TargetRecognition.description: Non-Cooperative Target Recognition using AESA JEM and high-range resolution profiles.

ThreatAssessment.label: AI Threat Assessment and Prioritization
ThreatAssessment.description: Automated ranking of threats by lethal range, timeline, and kinematic capability.

MissionPlanning_AI.label: AI Mission Planning
MissionPlanning_AI.description: Machine-assisted route planning, target selection, and contingency analysis.

CognitivePilotAssist.label: Cognitive Pilot Assistant
CognitivePilotAssist.description: AI system monitoring pilot state, reducing cognitive load, recommending actions.

AutonomousFlight.label: Autonomous Flight Management
AutonomousFlight.description: For UCAV and optionally manned platforms. Full autonomous navigation, obstacle avoidance, mission execution.

levels.L3_Delegated: AI executes mission segment autonomously with human authority to abort
levels.L4_Full_Auto: Full autonomous mission execution within rules of engagement

SwarmCoordination.label: Swarm / Collaborative Combat AI
SwarmCoordination.description: Multi-agent coordination algorithms for UAV swarms and loyal wingman.
